content.text:
Based on the zoomed view of atom 13, I can clearly identify its neighbor atoms.

## Results:

**Atom 13 (O:13) - Neighbor Atom:**
- **Atomic index:** 11
- **Element:** N (Nitrogen)

O:13 is part of a nitro group (-NO₂) where the nitrogen atom (N:11) is covalently bonded to two oxygen atoms (O:12 and O:13). Therefore, O:13 has only **one neighbor atom**, which is N:11.

**Geomconf_index:** 5493

question: Please find the neighbour atoms of the atom with atomic index 13, whose element should be O. Here, neighbour atoms are defined as atoms that are covalently connected to this atom. Report all neighbour atoms by listing their atomic index (as shown in the image) and their element. Also return the geomconf_index for this molecule.
